creator: dlowe@saturn5.com
text:
I've ported bulk_mailer-1.5, it's a small utility that works
	nicely with majordomo (and other) mailing list agents.  It sorts the
	recipient list by reversed domain name and bundles them up in
	groups of n addresses (where n is user-configurable and defaults
	to 20,) passing the bundles off to 'sendmail -bs' so that sendmail
	can deliver in parallel.

	This is my first try at a port - I'd appreciate comments/pointers
	very much.
